## Checklist
- [ ] `gofmt` applied (Go changes)
- [ ] `go vet` clean (Go changes)
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean (TypeScript changes)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (TypeScript changes)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any logic change
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changes
- [ ] `server/env.example` updated if new environment variables added
